emails.subject: Re: Revised Metals counterparties approval
emails.body: The only US counterparty that I recognize is Kaiser Aluminum Chemical Corporation. We have only done one deal with them. The deal has expired and the contract we used for this deal was a letter agreement that has also expired. Let me know if you need anything else. Thanks, Melissa Forwarded by Melissa Ann Murphy/HOU/ECT on 07/05/2000 10:12 AM From: Tana Jones on 07/05/2000 08:22 AM
